sections.sectionTitle: Kamsangpa tungah Thu a Dong Milim Biate tungah Thukhenna

verses.text: Tua ciangin Israel mi makai pawlkhat kei kiangah hong pai-in Pasian' deihna bang ahi hiam, ci-in hong dong uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih mite in milim bia uh a, milim in mawhna sungah amaute tun'pih hi. Amaute' thu theihnopte a gen dingin hong um uh ahi uh hiam

Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen hih thute gen in: Milim bia-in mawhna sungah milimte kitun'sak a, tua khit ciangin kamsangte tungah thu a dong dingin a hong pai Israel mi peuhmah in keima thudawn'na kam ngah ding uh hi. Tua thudawn'na pen a milim tampite uh in a zak dingun a kilawm dawn'na hi ding hi
Tua milimte in keima kiang panin Israel mite paikhiatpih uh a, ahi zongin tua bangin ka dawn'na tawh kei lamah ka mite ngahkik dingin ka kilamen hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen pen Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hong kihei kik un la, na milimte uh nusia un

Israel mite khat peuhpeuh ahi a, Israel mite lakah a om gamdang mi khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, kei kiang panin paikhia-in milim bia a, milim in mawhna sungah a tun'pih khit ciangin kamsangpa tungah thu a dong dingin a pai leh, Topa ahi keimah in ama thudotna ka dawng ding hi
Amah nialin, midangte' etteh dingin ka bawl ding hi. Keima mite lak panin amah ka lakhia ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na thei ding uh hi
Kamsang khat peuhpeuh in khemna tawh a manloin thu hong dawn' leh, Topa ahi keima khem hi ding hi. Israel mite lak panin tua kamsangpa ka lakhia ding hi
Kamsangpa leh kamsang thu a dongpa a gim thuakna uh kibang ding hi

Israel mite in kei hong nusiatlohna ding leh a mawhna uh tawh a kinitsak lohna dingun hih bangin ka hih ding hi. Amaute pen keima mi hi ding uh a, kei pen amaute' Pasian ka hi ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen hi,” a hong ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Jerusalem Gim A Thuman

verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, gam khat peuhpeuh in khialhna bawlin kei tungah hong thuman kei leh keimah in a annek dingteng uh ka susia ding hi. Kialpi tungsakin a mihing a ganhingin ka siasak ding hi
Noah, Daniel, leh Job, hih mihing thumte nangawn, amaute' lakah a om hi leh, amaute' hoihna in amau' nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtakzo ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi
Mite a that dingin gamsa kihtakhuaite khahkhia-in, kuamah khual a zin ngamlo dingin tua gamsung a lauhuai-in om leh

tua gamsungah hih mihing thumte nangawn a om bang hi leh, amaute' tanute leh tapate nangawn uh suahtak zoloin, amaute' nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtakzo ding uh a, tua gam pen gamkhing suak takpi ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi
Tua gamsungah gal tungsakin, mihing ganhing a siaksiang dingin a husia galhiamte kizang leh
tua sungah hih mihing thumte a om hangin amau' pumpi ciat simloh, amau' tate nangawn suahtakzo tuanlo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi
Tua gamah pulpi tungsakin, ka hehna tawh mihing ganhing sisak leng
tua sungah Noah, Daniel, leh Job-te a om ahi zongin, amaute' hoihna in amau' nuntakna ciat bek a hutzawh cihloh, amaute' tate nangawn huzo tuanlo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi
“Topa Pasian' thugen hih bang ahi hi: Mihing ganhing a sumai dingin gimna nasia pen li ahi gal, kialpi, a kihtakhuai gamsate, leh natna, Jerusalem-ah ka tungsak ding hi

A tanute a tapate a paikhiatpih dingin mi khat peuhpeuh a suaktazo kha a om a, nang kiangah hong pai leh, amaute' omzia na en in. Amaute' gitlohna zia na mu ding a, Jerusalem gim ka piakna a kilawm a thuman mah ahihna na phawk ding hi
Amaute' gitlohna zia na muh ciangin ka hihnate khempeuh a kilawm mah ahihna na phawk ding hi. Topa Pasian in thu hong gen khinta hi,” a hong ci hi.
